notes: Cursor CLI joins the lineup. cursor-agent is now a first-class agent with its own activity trail, alongside Claude, Codex, Copilot, OpenCode and Antigravity. Also fixed: a tab whose agent had finished no longer blended in with the idle ones — a finish you have not seen yet is still asking for you, so it keeps its status pill. New Tips page in the docs at rabbitty.app/docs/tips.
